name: Dual GPS and GPS-for-Yaw Configuration
description: You are a Drone Integration Engineer retrofitting a heavy-lift hexacopter with a Dual-RTK GPS system for operation near high-voltage powerlines. Configure the flight controller parameters in QGroundControl to enable Dual GPS Blending and GPS-for-Yaw using the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dual_gps_specs.txt. Correctly set GPS_TYPE2, GPS_AUTO_SWITCH, EK3_SRC1_YAW, COMPASS_ENABLE, and the antenna offset parameters (GPS_POS1_X, GPS_POS2_X, GPS_POS1_Z, GPS_POS2_Z) in meters using ArduPilot's NED coordinate system.
